products_list.name: 21k Gold Heritage Coin Frame Belt - 13 Bezels
products_list.description:
Description: Make an unforgettable statement of luxury and prestige with our solid 21k gold coin frame belts. A crowning masterpiece of traditional Middle Eastern bridal wear, this belt is intricately crafted from high-purity 21k yellow gold, featuring a spectacular row of gold-framed coins linked together in a seamless, majestic band. Designed to sit elegantly at the waist over traditional gowns or kaftans, it is the ultimate symbol of heritage, wealth, and celebration. A breathtaking heirloom piece to be treasured for generations.

Material: 21k Solid Yellow Gold
Design: Exquisite gold coin replicas held within detailed decorative frames.
Fit: Designed with an adjustable clasp to sit comfortably at the waist.
Occasion: The ultimate bridal dowry showcase, perfect for weddings, henna parties, and grand cultural celebrations.
